fields.description: Slot label that the print format looks up. Use a workflow role label (e.g. 'Approved Level 1', 'Approved Level 2', 'Authorised', 'Released') OR a free-form name (e.g. 'Siby Joy', 'Siby Thomas John') for static signers.
fields.label: Signature Slot

fields.description: Display name printed under the signature.
fields.label: Signer Name

fields.description: Optional. Printed below the signer name (e.g. 'Corp. Fin Manager').
fields.label: Designation

fields.description: Optional. If the slot resolves dynamically from a workflow signer, link the user here so the image auto-attaches when that user signs.
fields.label: Linked User
